brief_justification: Paper A describes a dynamical process involving ultracold atoms in higher lattice orbitals, focusing on band population control, tunneling, and the emergence of coherence (e.g., Bose-Einstein condensation). Paper B is a comparative review of nuclei and cold atomic gases, emphasizing conceptual overlaps in quantum systems but without detailing a specific dynamical mechanism or mathematical framework. No shared underlying machinery or role-for-role mapping emerges from the abstracts.
